response.reasoning: Role requires Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Candidate has ~15 years since 2009-2010, mostly senior/staff individual contributor roles in full-stack web, embedded, and data integration. Recent re:cinq role touches AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which is relevant but brief (~1 year). No evidence of director-level scope, strategy advisory work, executive influence, or recognized AI products/platforms. No advanced degree in AI. Strong craftsmanship and breadth, but lacks the AI thought-leadership, cloud-platform scale, and strategic advisory profile this Principal/Director role demands.
strengths: ~15 years of broad full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial drive
concerns: No demonstrated director-level leadership or strategy advisory experience
Limited and recent AI/ML depth; no recognized AI products or platforms
No advanced AI degree and minimal large-scale cloud platform strategy work

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and recognized AI products
Breadth of engineering experience across stacks

response.justification: The candidate is a strong hands-on senior engineer with broad full-stack experience and early exposure to AI-agent tooling, but the role explicitly targets a Director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise and strategic advisory capability. There is no evidence of building recognized AI platforms, advising strategic customers, or operating at principal/director scope, which are central to this position.
